name: academic-git
description: System-level Codex plugin for issue-driven academic Git workflows with local hooks, skills, MCP tools, lint, and HPC CI scaffolding guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-driven academic Git workflow with local hooks, lint, and HPC CI
interface.longDescription: System-level Codex plugin for academic research repositories. Skills guide issue, commit, lint, PR, and merge workflows; local Codex hooks protect opted-in repositories and preserve work with Stop auto-commit; project scaffolds can install GitHub Actions and SJTU HPC self-hosted CI gates.
defaultPrompt: Use academic-git for issue-driven research work.
